name: Sarasvati
description: Excellent early game healer and support. Learns Invigorate 2 at level 19 for SP regeneration.

recipe.notes: Inherit as much as you can, but focus on getting her to level 19 for Invigorate 2.

name: Rakshasa
description: Incredible physical damage dealer for the early game. Learns Brain Shake and Kill Rush.

recipe.notes: Try to inherit Auto-Sukukaja if possible to help with hit rates.

name: Black Frost
description: No weaknesses! Absorbs Ice and Fire, reflects Dark. Excellent mid-game magic user.

recipe.action: Special Fusion: Jack Frost + Pyro Jack + King Frost + Pixie + Ghoul
recipe.notes: Cross spread fusion. Can inherit Mind Charge to deal massive magic damage.

name: Ose
description: Great physical attacker with Power Charge.

recipe.notes: Triangle spread to create a stronger Fool persona. Inherit Power Charge.

name: Tam Lin
description: Incredible resistances and learns Auto-Maraku, Auto-Masuku, and Auto-Mataru (Tri-Auto).

recipe.action: Special Fusion: Phoenix + Gdon + Yatagarasu + Narasimha
recipe.notes: Make sure the materials learn the Auto-Ma skills so Tam Lin can inherit them to become the ultimate starter Persona.

name: Trumpeter
description: The master of debuffs and Almighty damage. Learns Debilitate and Megidolaon.

recipe.action: Special Fusion: Matador + White Rider + Daisoujou + Taotie + Pabilsag + Taown
recipe.notes: Hexagon spread fusion. Unlocks after reaching max rank in Margaret's Social Link.

name: Yoshitsune
description: The strongest physical Persona in the game thanks to his exclusive skill, Hassou Tobi.

recipe.action: Level up Masakado (Tower) to level 73 to learn Arms Master.
recipe.notes: Crucial for reducing Hassou Tobi's HP cost.

recipe.action: Special Fusion: Hachiman + Masakado + Oukuninushi + Hitokoto-Nushi + Shiki-Ouji
recipe.notes: Pentagon spread fusion. Requires December 17th or later.

name: Alice
description: The best Dark magic user with her exclusive 'Die for Me!' skill.

recipe.notes: Cross spread fusion. Can only be fused using these two specific Personas.
